SUMMARY: Experienced Talent Acquisition Specialist with over two decades of experience in recruitment, staffing, and human resources management. Skilled in evaluating and implementing best practices to enhance recruiting strategies and improve overall organizational performance.
SKILLS: Recruiting, Staffing, Training, College Recruiting, Sourcing, Phone Screens, Interviewing, Negotiation, Recruiting Events, New Hires, On-boarding, HRIS/ATS, HR Administration, Employee Issues, Terminations, Recruiting Best Practices, Performance Evaluations, EEO, Human Resources Management, Ms Office Suite
